description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with default image alpine:latest and stages build, test, and production. Add a hidden .rspec job in the test stage that uses the ruby:2.4.1 image, runs on branches only, and depends on postgres and redis services; its before_script downloads and prepares the CodeClimate test‑reporter, then the script installs bundler, therubyracer, execjs, updates apt and installs nodejs, runs bundle install, executes rake parallel:setup, and finally runs COVERAGE=true bundle exec parallel_rspec app/ spec/. After the job finishes it runs ./cc-test-reporter after-build and stores the coverage/ directory as an artifact. Define a production job in the production stage that uses the docker:git image with a docker:dind service, sets DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2, and executes the functions ensure_system_dependencies_are_installed, print_system_info, setup_docker, install_nanobox, and deploy to deploy the app to the production environment (https://aeonvera.com). Include global before_script that defines the codeclimate, ensure_system_dependencies_are_installed, print_system_info, setup_docker, install_nanobox, and deploy functions, and set POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_ENABLED, POSTGRES_PASSWORD, and POSTGRES_USER variables for the database service.
